section.heading: Income gap multiplier
section.chapeau: For purposes of determining the income gap of a unit of general local government under section 6705(b)(4)(A),11 So in original. Probably should be section “6705(c)(4)(A),”. the number which applies is—

paragraph.content: 1.6, with respect to ½ of any amount allocated under section 6704 to the State in which the unit is located; and
1.2, with respect to the remainder of such amount.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 6706, Pub. L. 97–258, Sept. 13, 1982, 96 Stat. 1014, related to reductions in State government allocations, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 99–272, title XIV, § 14001(a)(1), (e), Apr. 7, 1986, 100 Stat. 327, 329, eff. Oct. 18, 1986.
